name: Chinese: Spicy Chicken (Le Tze Gee) - Shangtu
recipeInstructions:
1. Bone and cube the chicken.
2. Mix sherry, soy sauce, and corn starch in a bowl.
3. Marinate the chicken in the cornstarch mixture for 15 minutes.
4. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
5. Add the marinated chicken to the pan and stir-fry for 2 minutes, then remove from the pan.
6. In the same pan, add the diced bamboo shoots, Hoison sauce, chopped scallion, ginger, and crushed red pepper.
7. Stir well until all ingredients are combined.
8. Return the chicken to the pan and cook for an additional minute.
9. Serve hot.
